game_info.title: Brawl Arena
game_info.concept:
Brawl Stars is a fast-paced, real-time multiplayer arena combat game featuring various 3v3 or 5v5 game modes and a solo/duo battle royale. Players control unique "Brawler" characters using a virtual joystick for movement and virtual buttons for their main attack and powerful "Super" ability, which charges through combat. Progression involves unlocking new Brawlers and upgrading their stats like health and damage using collected power points and coins, alongside acquiring Star Powers and Gadgets for tactical advantages. The game offers diverse objectives, such as collecting 10 gems in Gem Grab or being the last Brawler standing in Showdown, all within typical 3-minute match limits. Players climb a trophy road and global leaderboards, unlocking new content and participating in seasonal Brawl Passes that deliver new Brawlers, skins, and resources.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/brawl-stars/id1229016807?uo=4

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Fast paced 3v3 & 5v5 MOBA and Battle Royale made for mobile! Play online with friends or solo across a variety of PvP arena game modes in under three minutes.


Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful super abilities, star powers and gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious arena locations within the MOBA Brawliverse!




◉ BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES:


▶ Gem Grab (3v3,5v5): Team up for real time 3v3 and 5v5 MOBA arena PvP battles against online players from across the world. Team up to battle and out strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.


▶ Showdown (solo/duo): A MOBA battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo, be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest MOBA PvP battle royale yet. Winner takes it all! 


▶ Brawl Ball (3v3,5v5): It's a whole new brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.


▶ Bounty (3v3,5v5): Battle to take out opponents and earn stars, but don’t let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!


▶ Heist (3v3,5v5): Protect your team’s safety and try to crack open your opponents’. Navigate the arena to sneak, blast, battle and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.


▶ Special MOBA Events: Limited time special MOBA PvE and PvP arena battle game modes.


▶ Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!




◉ UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS:


Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful super abilities, star powers and gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skin.
A fast paced battle royale MOBA made for mobile. Unlock and collect new, powerful "brawlers", each with a signature attack and super ability.



◉ BRAWL PASS:


Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.



◉ BECOME THE STAR PLAYERS


Battle to climb the local and regional PvP leaderboards to prove you’re the greatest MOBA brawler of them all! Join or start your own MOBA club with fellow players online to share tips and battle together. Climb to the top of the PvP leaderboards in global and local rankings.




◉ CONSTANTLY EVOLVING MOBA


Look out for new "brawlers", skins, maps, special events and game modes in the future. Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins. Enjoy PVP battles solo or with friends online.
New PVP and PVE events and game modes daily. Player designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master.




Please note!
Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Game also includes random rewards.




From the makers of “Clash of Clans”, “Clash Royale” and “Boom Beach”!




Notice of Access Permission:
[Optional permission]
Brawl Stars may request permission via in-game pop ups to access your camera and send you notifications.
Camera: For in-game scanning of QR codes
Notifications: For sending notifications related to the game
Consent is optional and you can use the app and play the game regardless of whether or not you consent. You may refuse to give consent within the game. However, certain app features may not work properly if you refuse optional access permissions.




Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings > Help and Support — or visit http://help.supercellsupport.com/brawlstars/en/index.html


Privacy Policy:

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/


Parent’s Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/


Youtube:
https://www.youtube.com/wkbrl
game_info.description: Brawl Arena is a fast-paced 2D top-down shooter where you control a Brawler in a battle for supremacy. The objective is to collect purple Gems that spawn in the center of the arena. Collect 10 Gems and hold onto them for a countdown duration to win the match. However, enemy bots will try to defeat you; if you run out of health, you drop your gems and the game is over. Charge your Super ability by damaging enemies to unleash a devastating attack!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move your Brawler. Aiming is automatic in the direction of movement or the last faced direction.
- Space: Fire your main weapon.
- Z: Activate Super ability (requires full charge).
- Shift: Dash (short burst of speed).
- Enter: Start Game.
- ESC: Pause / Resume.
- R: Restart (from Game Over).

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Movement and Survival Test. The player should move around the map avoiding collisions and maintaining health.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will detect the nearest enemy and calculate a vector away from it to flee. It will also fire indiscriminately to clear paths.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player survives for at least 15 seconds without health dropping to zero, demonstrating functional movement and collision logic.

TEST_2.test_description: Objective Completion Test (Gem Collection). The player attempts to win the game by collecting gems.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller identifies the location of gems and moves towards them. If enemies are within range, it fires at them. Once 10 gems are collected, it switches to evasive maneuvers.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player successfully collects 10 gems and triggers the countdown phase, eventually reaching the WIN state.

TEST_3.test_description: Combat and Super Ability Test. Verifies that damage dealing and super charging mechanics work.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The bot aggressively seeks out enemies to shoot them. Once the Super meter is full (tracked in gameState), it activates the Super ability (Z key).
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The player deals damage, the Super meter fills up, and the Super ability is successfully deployed, resetting the meter.
